data: {"generalSituation":"The tropical cyclone near Taiwan will move towards the seas south of Japan in the next couple of days. Under the influence of its subsiding air, winds will be weak and the weather will be extremely hot over Guangdong today. Thundery showers triggered by high temperatures will affect the region. A broad trough of low pressure will linger over the vicinity of the coast of southern China to the northern part of the South China Sea during weekend to midweek next week. There will be heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. High temperature weather will be alleviated. An easterly airstream is expected to affect the coast of eastern Guangdong midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260605","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"West to southwest force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods and a few showers.
